race.description: Digital Vision Direction Qtis Maiden Hcp
race.comment: MR HILTON (1) just ran into one better in town at the latest effort and should find this assignment a touch easier. Drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley and is sure to be right there when the whips are cracking. Former Victorian RUMBLE TOWN (19) is having his first run for the new stable but showed ability down south and this is a softer test. Keep very safe. RISE AND RESIST (11) resumes here but the form he showed when last in work was good enough for a race of this calibre. Can feature while fresh. BOOMTOWN LADDIE (8) will be better off for that first-up run and gets the services of Rodd in the irons. Include in calculations. The well-related ZAYYANO (7) (half to 2xG1 winner Grunt) best of the rest.
